Name: Average time from Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE to Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE

Name: Total time between Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE and Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE across all cases where both activities occur

Name: Minimum time it takes Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE after the execution of Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE

Name: Average time for Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE grouped by case:BudgetNumber

Name: Minimum time between Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE and Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER across all rejected cases involving a pre-approver
